PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY AND COMPLIANCE WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDER AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN PART. THE COURT ORDERS THAT COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS SHALL CONTACT DEFENDANTS LILVIU ILIOI, COSTICA NICHITEAN AND EUROPEAN LINE, INC. AS WELL AS DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE CARRIER, CANAL INSURANCE, AND ITS ADJUSTERS SOUTHLAND CLAIMS, TO DETERMINE IF ALL PHOTOGRAPHS AND DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO THE PRIOR ORDER OF THE COURT HAVE BEEN PROVIDED TO PLAINTIFF. IF ANY FURTHER DOCUMENTS OR PHOTOGRAPHS EXIST, THEY SHALL BE PROVIDED FORTHWITH TO PLAINTIFF. IF ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS HAVE BEEN PRODUCED, DEFENDANTS SHALL VERIFY THAT REPRESENTATION BY NOVEMBER 5, 2004. THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANTS PREVIOUSLY MADE EVASIVE RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1836.30, TO BE PAID ON OR BEFORE NOVEMBER 5, 2004. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ISSUE OR EVIDENTIARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED. DEFENDANTS ORDERED TO PAY COSTS OF FURTHER DEPOSITIONS OF SPECIFIED WITNESSES. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
ORDER RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL
